items.title: FHFA moves to drop ‘reputational harm’ from consideration in counterparty suspensions
items.summary: The Federal Housing Finance Agency wants to drop “reputational harm” as a basis for suspending firms and individuals that do business with Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac and the Federal Home Loan Banks.
